partial_progress.details: Comprehensive torsor analysis, Mathlib assessment, archival candidates, and viable approach identified

findings_summary.torsor_viability: Viable. AddTorsor, Group (alpha equivo alpha), LinearOrder.lift all available in Mathlib.
findings_summary.recommended_approach: Strategy C: FMCS-based torsor construction. Avoids explicit Aut+(T) homogeneity proof.
findings_summary.key_risk: Homogeneity proof (transitivity of automorphism action) is the hardest step.
